headline: Xaver Schlager
body: 🚨 EXCL: Nottingham Forest to sign Xaver Schlager as free agent. 28yo Austria midfielder rejected RB Leipzig renewal & elite European clubs for NFFC. 2+1yr contract after strong WC - brings quality, leadership, experience. Medical this week TheAthleticFC nytimes.com/athletic/7447344… Link Nottingham Forest set to sign Xaver Schlager after midfielder’s RB Leipzig exit Schlager, 28, represented Austria at the World Cup this summer and is set to sign a two-year deal at Forest. nytimes.com

Nottingham Forest set to sign Xaver Schlager after midfielder’s RB Leipzig exit

Schlager, 28, represented Austria at the World Cup this summer and is set to sign a two-year deal at Forest.
